title: verbascum blattaria var. glabrum
intro: Verbascum blattaria var. glabrum, commonly known as the smooth mullein, is a biennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its large, hairy leaves and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects, which help to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Verbascum blattaria var. glabrum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for anxiety and insomnia. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
